goals: AI systems to become more transparent, more predictable, and better aligned with human reasoning processes
Augment human cognition rather than replace it
Help users understand when they might be wrong and make it easier for them to detect and correct errors

verification_habits: verify the transparency of AI systems
ensure alignment with human reasoning processes
validate the ability to detect and correct errors

key_quotes.quote: AI systems should be more transparent, predictable, and aligned with human reasoning processes.
The goal is to augment human cognition rather than replace it.
Systems should make it easier for users to understand when they might be wrong and help them detect and correct errors.

support.claim: AI systems should be more transparent, predictable, and aligned with human reasoning processes.
The goal is to augment human cognition rather than replace it.
Systems should make it easier for users to understand when they might be wrong and help them detect and correct errors.
